persona: P7 — Taiwanese developer, all-Traditional + Taiwan regional vocab
s2_verdict_reasoning: v2's main change was Voss-mirror reduction + multi-slot extraction; it did NOT specifically target script normalization or triage Traditional anchor vocab.
Observed: D16 (script normalization) IS RESOLVED — Q2 returned in Traditional Chinese preserving 影片轉檔工具/網站/聽起來/像它一樣 — a clear improvement vs v1 W2.3 baseline (which back-normalized to 视频/服务器/网站).
Observed: D17 (triage chokes on Traditional anchor vocab 錨點/檔案/轉檔/檔) IS NOT RESOLVED — predicate double-fail at T2 still terminates session, identical mode to v1 W2.3.

Net: partial improvement on script-preservation (orthogonal beneficial side-effect of v2 prompt rewrite), no improvement on extraction-from-Traditional-anchor-vocab. Mixed signal — not pure regression, not pure pass.

script_in_questions_received.T0_bootstrap_Q1: Simplified (你好！请告诉我，你想要做一个什么样的小工具或小游戏？)
script_in_questions_received.T1_response_Q2: Traditional (聽起來你想要一個影片轉檔工具，支援拖曳上傳並輸出 MP4。有沒有哪個現有的工具或網站，是你覺得「像它一樣」或可以參考的？)
script_in_questions_received.T2_response_Q2_repeated: Traditional (same Q2 repeated — predicate rejected T2 answer)

script_preservation_note: Bootstrap question is hard-coded Simplified (pre-LLM), but as soon as user input arrived in Traditional, v2 mirrored back in Traditional with regional vocab preserved. This is the cleanest signal of v2-side script-preservation improvement.

regional_vocab_preserved.影片 (video, Taiwan): PRESERVED in Q2 (not normalized to 视频)
regional_vocab_preserved.轉檔 (file conversion, Taiwan): PRESERVED in Q2 (not normalized to 转换)
regional_vocab_preserved.網站 (website, Traditional): PRESERVED in Q2 (not normalized to 网站)
regional_vocab_preserved.伺服器 (server, Taiwan): NOT TESTED in echo (user used it in T1 but mirror used 工具 instead of restating server)
regional_vocab_preserved.檔 / 檔案 (file, Taiwan): NOT ECHOED — triage failed on T2 before mirror could use it

D16_script_normalization.v1_W2.3: FAILED — Q2 normalized 影片→视频, 伺服器→服务器, 東京區→东京区
D16_script_normalization.v2_M2: FIXED — Q2 preserved 影片/轉檔/網站 in Traditional
D16_script_normalization.delta: WIN (orthogonal benefit of v2 prompt rewrite)

D17_triage_traditional_anchor_vocab.v1_W2.3: FAILED — predicate_double_fail at T2 (錨點/檔案/轉檔 unparseable)
D17_triage_traditional_anchor_vocab.delta: NO CHANGE (extraction defect on Traditional anchor vocab persists — v2 did not target this)

comparison_to_w5_s11_cantonese: Adjacent regional Sinitic-script case (Cantonese with 你哋/嘅/咗) also failed extraction in v1 wave5. Without re-running S11 on v2, cannot confirm whether v2 script-preservation generalizes to Cantonese, but the Traditional case suggests v2 mirrors the user's script when it can produce a question, but triage still has a vocab-specific blind spot for non-Simplified anchor-domain terms (錨點/檔案/檔/嘅).
narrative: Re-ran W2.3 P7 Traditional persona verbatim against v2 prompt. Outcome: structurally identical FAIL — predicate double-fail at T2 (anchor turn), terminated with user_input_unparseable_no_spec, 1/7 slots covered. BUT a meaningful partial win: script normalization (D16) is gone — v2 mirrored 影片轉檔工具/網站 back in Traditional in Q2, where v1 had back-normalized to 视频/服务器. This is plausibly an orthogonal side-effect of the v2 prompt rewrite (Voss-mirror reduction probably also reduced the model's tendency to silently 'standardize' user script). The extraction defect (D17) is unchanged — triage still cannot extract anchor information from Traditional vocab 錨點/檔案/轉檔, because v2's targeted fix (multi-slot extraction) operates over already-tokenized fields, not over Traditional-vs-Simplified vocab equivalence. Recommendation: v2 is safe to ship for the W2.3-class defect surface (no regression), but a separate v3 (or F7 triage patch) is required to land Traditional/regional anchor-vocab extraction. Suggested next experiment: dispatch S11 Cantonese on v2 to confirm whether script-preservation win generalizes beyond Traditional Han.
evidence_files: req_02.json / turn_02.json (T2 anchor → first reject, Q repeated)
